turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
How Long to Forecast
When valuing a company, we typically assume the business is a going concern.
Which of the following is the best definition of going concern?


The business will operate for a finite amount of time and we know exactly when the operations will end.
A going concern means the business is currently cash flow positive.
A going concern assumes the business operates indefinitely.
A going concern means the company is concerned it will cease operations in the near future

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: A going concern assumes the business operates indefinitely.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Introduction to Comparable Valuation Analysis – Relative Valuation Disadvantages
Relative valuation has several disadvantages relative to other valuation techniques.
Which of the following is a disadvantage of relative valuation?


Too simplistic
Easy to use
Harder to manipulate compared to a DCF
Many good peers to the target company
